page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ae.xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance based on the x86_64 architecture. It features 4 dedicated physical cores powered by an AMD EPYC 9T34 processor with a base frequency of 3.4 GHz. The instance is equipped with 16.0 GB of system memory, yielding a 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio of 4.0 GB per core. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this configuration does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on network-attached storage and providing a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates top-tier single-core CPU performance, with stress-ng single-core results placing in the top 10%. Multi-core CPU performance, large-block memory bandwidth, and PassMark CPU scores fall within the average middle 50% range. Conversely, the instance shows weaker performance in cached small-block memory bandwidth, multi-threaded bzip3 decompression, and database-related operations, including Redis SET operations and static web serving throughput, which rank in the bottom 25%.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated CPU allocation combined with strong single-core performance provides balanced value for compute tasks that do not require massive parallelization or high memory throughput. The lack of bundled local storage and moderate network baseline make it a predictable option for general-purpose workloads. It is best suited for application servers, microservices, light web serving, and development environments that benefit from high single-thread execution speeds.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ae.xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 4 dedicated AMD EPYC 9T34 physical cores clocked at 3.4 GHz and 16.0 GB of RAM. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this x86_64 instance lacks local storage and GPU acceleration, but provides a 4 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Performance benchmarks reveal top-tier single-core CPU capabilities, though multi-core execution and large-block memory bandwidth remain average. Conversely, cached small-block memory bandwidth, database operations, and Redis throughput fall into the lower tier. This hardware profile delivers balanced cost efficiency for workloads requiring dedicated CPU resources without massive memory or storage demands. It is well-suited for general-purpose applications, microservices, and development environments.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g8ae.xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 4 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 16 GB RAM, and top-tier single-core performance, suitable for application servers and general workloads.

tagline: A dedicated processor instance delivering top tier single core performance for balanced workloads without the need for local storage.
bullet_points: 4 dedicated AMD EPYC 9T34 physical cores running at 3.4 GHz
16.0 GB of system memory providing a balanced 1:4 resource ratio
Top-tier single-core CPU performance in stress-ng benchmarks
4 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with no local storage bundled
Suitable for general-purpose applications, microservices, and development environments
